acceptance_criteria: The recursive method is documented and committed in repo artifacts.
The process validator enforces stage order, handoffs, module profile evidence, and changed-path coverage.

open_questions.question: Parent work item closes through child slices rather than direct code generation.

objective: Define the child slices required to implement the recursive method.
change_slices: Add process contracts and embedding tests.
Publish the core playbook and prompt procedures.
Build the validator, fixtures, CI workflow, and PR template.
test_scenarios: Contract serialization and codegen embedding succeed.
Validator accepts valid split and leaf work items.
Validator rejects missing stages, skipped handoffs, and missing module profile evidence.

notes: Prompt procedures emit explicit stage artifacts and handoffs.
Agent guidance now references prompt procedures and validation responsibilities.
Process artifacts are additive v1 contracts.
Schema embedding and fixture tests will be added alongside the contracts.
The validator lives in shared tooling for cross-workspace reuse.
The validator checks process conformance only and does not own domain policy logic.

rollout_notes: Ship the contracts and validator before requiring the workflow in CI.
